tato.name: Example Tato
tato.bio: Tato is a brave little starch warrior from the underground kingdom of Spudlandia. He loves basking in warm butter and fighting against the iron grip of the evil peeling machine.

karreth.name: Example Karreth
karreth.bio: Karreth wears an armored metal helmet crafted from recycled kitchen tools. He is tough as nails, silent, and highly resistant to being mashed.

cherry-bomb.name: Cherry Bomb
cherry-bomb.bio: Cherry Bomb is explosive in personality and flavor. She has a short fuse and triggers a burst of sweet heat whenever she rolls into battle.

mr-pickle.name: Mr. Pickle
mr-pickle.bio: Mr. Pickle is seasoned, salty, and a bit sour. He spent three months fermenting in the deep jar of wisdom, acquiring unique brine magic.

sir-brocco.name: Sir Brocco
sir-brocco.bio: Sir Brocco defends the green kingdom with his towering leafy canopy. He provides high fiber armor and healing vitamins to his fellow food warriors.

eggy-boy.name: Eggy Boy
eggy-boy.bio: Eggy Boy is an egg with a hard shell but a soft, runny heart. He excels at shielding allies, though one hard hit can crack his defenses.

donut-dude.name: Donut Dude
donut-dude.bio: Donut Dude spreads happiness and high blood sugar wherever he goes. His sugar glaze acts as a magical shield that sweetens even the grumpiest foes.

melon-head.name: Melon Head
melon-head.bio: Melon Head is cool, refreshing, and full of water magic. He rolls through obstacles and uses melon-seed projectiles for ranged attacks.

shroomy.name: Shroomy
shroomy.bio: Shroomy operates in the shadows of the bottom shelf. He releases sleeping spores that confuse enemies, making him a stealthy and unpredictable ally.

pizza-slice.name: Pizza Slice
pizza-slice.bio: Pizza Slice wields the molten power of mozzarella. He binds enemies in sticky, gooey cheese strings and delivers a hot pepperoni blast.
